description: Multiple cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerabilities in Invision Power Board (IPB or IP.Board) 2.2.2, and possibly earlier, allows remote attackers to inject arbitrary web script or HTML via (1) module_bbcodeloader.php, (2) module_div.php, (3) module_email.php, (4) module_image.php, (5) module_link.php, or (6) the editorid parameter to module_table.php in jscripts/folder_rte_files/.  NOTE: some details were obtained from third party sources.
